commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the unrelated date-fns and react-hook-form lockfile changes while keeping the Supabase patch bump.; Needs attention: The diff has a concrete supply-chain scope concern because it introduces unrelated third-party package versions in a PR that declares only a Supabase update.; Review finding: [P2] Keep the lockfile bump scoped to Supabase — pnpm-lock.yaml:33 (sha=f055e172c4ce5cea97f3bbdcd8ef09386c94b433)
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates `pnpm-lock.yaml` for `@supabase/supabase-js` 2.106.1 to 2.106.2 and also changes `date-fns` and `react-hook-form` lockfile entries.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency lockfile update, not a reported runtime bug. Source inspection of the PR commit and current main is enough to verify the scope mismatch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the unrelated `date-fns` and `react-hook-form` lockfile changes while keeping the Supabase patch bump.
